description: Satellite imagery of the world's largest sand sea, showing parallel rows of dunes and salt flats (sabkhas).

location: Ar Rub' al Khali Sand Sea
description: Astronaut photograph highlighting linear reddish-brown sand dunes in the southeastern margin of Rub al Khali.
Historical and archaeological context of the lost city of Ubar, often associated with the people of Aad, discovered using satellite imagery.
